name: cvf-safety-runtime
description: CVF Safety Runtime — Policy enforcement engine for non-coder AI safety

scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run format:check

blockers: Mixed package: contains UI layer (cvf-ui/), Express server, Prisma, React, Next.js — not suitable for library export as-is
Heavy runtime dependencies (express, next, react, react-dom, zod) create consumer burden
Export surface should be scoped to simulation/ subdirectory only (sandbox.isolation.contract.ts)
Requires package boundary split before publication: separate simulation/ into standalone package
